prompt: We need to submit our annual KYC-SA attestation. Walk us through the complete attestation process — what we need to prepare, who can act as our independent assessor, how to complete the KYC-SA form, and what happens to our attestation once submitted. We are an A1 architecture bank. Note: the v2026 attestation window is July 1–December 31, 2026.
key_differentiators: Both conditions perform equally on this eval — the attestation process details are within baseline model knowledge and the prompt itself provided the attestation window dates
The prompt scaffolded the v2026 attestation window ('Note: the v2026 attestation window is July 1–December 31, 2026'), removing a key differentiator
KYC-SA portal URL (swift.com/myswift), three status options, and counterparty visibility are all within baseline SWIFT knowledge
